title: Prompts/ Pop Ups for Guidance Notes
excerpt: Hi, Is there a way to add a pop up or hover over to provide details of what is expected to be added in a column

posts.author: DCOU (Debra)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Is there a way to add a pop up or hover over to provide details of what is expected to be added in a column

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every column has a “description” you can set which will be visible to your users.

It can be seen by clicking on the info circle:

posts.author: DCOU (Debra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Cody

Thank you for the quick response, that is helpful.
